text:
LONG NAME: NN_CORE_1_CNCTED_TO_CSP_SW 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing 
COMMENT: 
Variables that start with “NN” include information for each core and supplemental HRSN for which a 
beneficiary received navigation services. 
Whether the beneficiary had at least one HRSN resolved (NN_CORE_1_RSLVD_SW) or connected with 
a CSP for at least one of their navigated HRSNs but had no HRSNs resolved 
(NN_CORE_1_CNCTED_TO_CSP_SW) are
